reasons.title: I understand craftspeople
reasons.text: Carpenter by trade, I know what it's like to work with your hands and manage clients. No jargon, no BS.

reasons.title: Local & available
reasons.text: Based in Brittany, available to meet in person. Not a provider on the other side of the world you'll never see.

reasons.title: Fixed price, no surprises
reasons.text: Signed quote before starting. 50% upfront, 50% on delivery. You know exactly what you're paying.

reasons.title: Delivered in 2-3 weeks
reasons.text: No 6-month wait. A clear timeline, defined milestones, a site delivered on schedule.

profileCard.name: Gianni — Djanni Studio
profileCard.quote: I'm a carpenter by trade. I learned to build things that are solid, lasting, and truly useful. I apply the same philosophy to the web.

temoignages.title: What they say.
temoignages.subtitle: Craftspeople and local businesses who trusted Djanni Studio.

process.title: 4 steps, zero surprises.
process.subtitle: A clear process from first contact to launch.

steps.title: We talk
steps.text: A 30-minute call to understand your business, your needs, and what you want to convey.

steps.title: I propose
steps.text: A clear quote and a visual mockup. You see what your site will look like before signing.

steps.title: We build
steps.text: I develop your site, you validate each step. No surprises at delivery.

steps.title: We launch
steps.text: Deployment, SSL, content management training. Your site is ready to work for you.

faq.title: Still hesitating?
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions everyone asks before starting their project.

items.question: How long does it take to create a website?
items.answer: On average, a starter website is delivered in 2 weeks. A premium site takes about 3 weeks. I give you a precise timeline as soon as the quote is signed.

items.question: I know nothing about technology, is that a problem?
items.answer: Not at all. That's actually most of my clients. I handle all the technical aspects and explain everything in simple terms. All you need to provide is your texts and photos.

items.question: What happens after the site goes live?
items.answer: I train you on managing your content. If you need changes later, I'm available. A maintenance plan is also offered if you want peace of mind.

items.question: Why not a WordPress or Wix site?
items.answer: These tools are convenient but limited in performance and customization. I develop custom sites that are faster, better ranked, and truly yours — no forced monthly subscription.

items.question: How does payment work?
items.answer: Simple: 50% when signing the quote, 50% on delivery. No hidden fees, no mandatory subscription. The quoted price is the final price.

items.question: Can I see the site before paying?
items.answer: Yes. I present a visual mockup before starting development. You approve the design, and only then do I build. At each stage, you can request adjustments.

items.question: Will my site be visible on Google?
items.answer: Yes. Every site is optimized for natural search (SEO) from creation: clean technical structure, properly filled tags, maximum performance. I also help you choose the right keywords for your business.

items.question: Can I edit my site myself?
items.answer: It depends on the plan chosen. For a starter site, changes go through me (included in the maintenance plan). For a premium site, I can integrate a content management system if you want to be autonomous.

items.question: Do you work outside of Brittany?
items.answer: Of course. Most of my clients are in Brittany, but I work remotely with craftspeople and shop owners throughout France. Video call, phone, email — we adapt.

about.intro: I'm Gianni, founder of Djanni Studio. I create custom websites for craftspeople and local businesses in Brittany. My unconventional background is my strength: I understand your craft because I come from the field.

journey.title: From the worksite to code.
journey.subtitle: An uncommon path, but one that makes all the difference when working with craftspeople.

steps.title: Carpenter by trade
steps.text: I started on construction sites. Cut, adjust, assemble — building solid things with my hands. That's where I learned rigor, meeting deadlines, and the importance of work well done.

steps.title: Self-taught web developer
steps.text: In parallel, I became passionate about code. React, Next.js, TypeScript — I learned by building real projects. Same philosophy as carpentry: solid work, custom-made, no shortcuts.

steps.title: Djanni Studio was born
steps.text: I launched Djanni Studio with a clear mission: help Breton craftspeople and shop owners get a website that truly represents them. Because I know their daily life, I speak their language.

steps.title: The web accessible to craftspeople
steps.text: No jargon, no inflated prices, no endless delays. A beautiful, fast, and effective site, delivered in 2-3 weeks. It's that simple.

values.title: What I believe in.
values.subtitle: Simple principles that guide every project.

items.title: Honesty
items.text: Fixed price, clear quote, no hidden fees. What I say is what I do.

items.title: Quality
items.text: Every site is custom coded. No templates, no WordPress — clean, high-performance code.

items.title: Proximity
items.text: Based in Brittany, available for a coffee. Not a ghost provider behind a screen.

items.title: Simplicity
items.text: I explain everything in simple terms. Your only job: tell me about your business.

skills.title: The tools I use.
